working_on: Phase 1.5 (Mission Realignment) opens at S-0013: record Phase 1.5 in STATE.md + ROADMAP.md, author ADR 0033 (mission realignment as structured guidance for self-learners + globe/reward visual-system obsolescence), light-revise ADR 0018 to remove globe-rendering use case (algorithm survives as graph-analysis primitive), reframe MISSION.md What this is around the structured-guidance gap.
outcome_summary: Phase 1.5 (Mission Realignment Overhaul) opens. ADR 0033 records mission realignment as structured guidance for self-learners and the deliberate architectural removal (not deferral) of the globe / mastery-glow / cross-domain-tendrils / trophy / 'knowledge as a world' UI metaphor. ADR 0018 light-revised — globe-rendering use case retired; flat-domain-tags + community-detection algorithm survives as graph-analysis primitive (potential downstream consumers: Discovery surface clustering at S-0014, syllabus heuristics, ADR 0016 Phase 4 audit). docs/MISSION.md What this is gains 'The gap Paideia fills' subsection naming the structured-guidance gap as the core value claim plus the two novel-value mechanisms (graph + instructor) that address it. ROADMAP gains new Phase 1.5 section between Phase 1 (closed) and Phase 2 (deferred S-0013 → S-0017); names the four-session arc (S-0013 → S-0016) with sub-phase scopes and Phase 1.5 success criteria. adr/README.md orientation extended with Phase 1.5 arc; new Phase 1.5 — Mission Realignment table added with ADR 0033 row. MemPalace decision drawer drawer_paideia_general_43b28d4bbab2382f44196600 filed (verbatim conversational reasoning per the two-layer decision-recording discipline). CHANGELOG entries for S-0013 added under [Unreleased]. ADR count: 33 ADRs total (32 Accepted + 1 Superseded). Recovery from a silent drop recorded as part of session scope: the Phase 1.5 plan was approved via plan-mode at S-0013 boot but the plan file landed at ~/.claude/plans/at-its-core-this-iterative-beaver.md (local developer config), not in tracked project artifacts; STATE.md still pointed S-0013 at Phase 2; recovery (recording Phase 1.5 in ROADMAP.md / STATE.md / ADR 0033) is part of S-0013's scope; lesson recorded for future sessions: plan-mode artifacts do not propagate into the project's session protocol on their own. tools/validate.py: 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns. Commits: chore(session): eager-claim S-0013; chore(session): bump register_state for S-0013; feat(roadmap): add Phase 1.5; feat(adr): land ADR 0033; feat(phase-1.5): close S-0013. Next: S-0014 Phase 1.5.2 — Discovery / Planning / Engagement triad architecture (ADR 0034 + substantial rewrites of docs/ui-architecture.md and docs/session-lifecycle.md).
